title: acrostichum serratum
intro: Acrostichum serratum, also known as the needle fern, is a type of aquatic fern that grows in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of Acrostichum serratum include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Acrostichum serratum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
